word: H3334 - יָצַר - yâtsar - yaw-tsar' - Be distressed

sections.paragraph:
Original: יצר

Transliteration: yâtsar

Phonetic: yaw-tsar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bind, be distressed, be in distress, be cramped, be narrow, be scant, be in straits, make narrow, cause distress, beseige
    1. (Qal) to suffer distress

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1973

Part(s) of speech: Verb
